title: Index of Suttas
contentHtml:
The suttas listed below are available here at Access to Insight. A handful of sutta-like passages from the Vinaya Pitaka are also listed here.

Sutta references are either to sutta number (in the case of DN, MN, and Iti), samyutta and sutta number (SN), nipata and sutta number (AN), verse number (Dhp), vagga and sutta number (Ud, Sn), or vagga and poem number (Thag, Thig). The translator's name appears in the square brackets [].

A number of suttas are regarded by senior Theravada Buddhist teachers as being especially noteworthy. Click on to visit the Sutta Readings website and hear a teacher read it aloud.

See also the list of "Translations by Translator".
